name: Off Helper
description: Mac companion app for the Off iOS app — remote shutdown/restart/sleep/WOL for Mac

download.note: No version in filename. Hosted on Amazon S3 via CloudFront.

changelog.note: No changelog, version history, or release notes page found

release_date.note: Last-Modified header on DMG is the only date signal. As of 2026: Wed, 07 Feb 2024 14:47:39 GMT — very old.

notes: Obscure utility by BRIDGETECH SOLUTIONS LIMITED. No Sparkle feed, no API, no version page, no Mac App Store. The only update detection method is comparing Last-Modified or Content-Length headers on the DMG, or mounting the DMG and reading Info.plist. Appears to have been abandoned (last update ~2024).
